templates.email-draft.md:
Subject: Settlement request received for {Settlement Period}

Hi {Partner Name},

Thanks for sending the settlement request for {Settlement Period}. I received the requested amount of {Requested Amount} and will review the invoice link and payment details.

I have the due date noted as {Due Date}. I will follow up if anything is missing.

Best,
FormOps Kit example
templates.drive-folder-plan.md:
